title: lass hastata
intro: Lass hastata, also known as water pepper or water hemp, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of lass hastata include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary issues. Lass hastata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used as a poultice to apply topically to affected areas.
